zh.of Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, En: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Pierrepont於大約1263年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特時，他的父親Lord Henry de Pierrepont33歲，母親Annora Manvers30歲。他於1293年與Sarah Heriz在英國德比夏爾素斯 文費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1333年3月6日在英國諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pierrepont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Pierrepont was born about 1263, in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Henry de Pierrepont, was 33 and his mother, Annora Manvers, was 30. He married Sarah Heriz in 1293, in South Wingfield, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 6 March 1333, in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 71.

Il a épousé Sarah Heriz en 1293, à South Wingfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 6 mars 1333, à Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Pierrepontが約1263年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホールメ ピエレプオントで生まれた時，父Lord Henry de Pierrepontは33歳，母Annora Manversは30歳であった。1293年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアソウス ウィングフィールドでSarah Herizと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1333年3月6日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホールメ ピエレプオントで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Pierrepont(이)가 대략 1263년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 홀 피레폰트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Henry de Pierrepont(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Annora Manvers(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1293년 영국 더비실르 소우스 윙필드에서 Sarah Heriz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 3월 6일 영국 노틴그함실르 홀 피레폰트에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Pierrepont родился около 1263 г. в местности холм пьиррепонт, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Henry de Pierrepont было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Annora Manvers, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Heriz в 1293 г. в местности соут вингфиелд, дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 6 марта 1333 г. в местности холм пьиррепонт, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.
